videos.headline: BYU's Miles Davis breaks scoreless tie with TD vs. Baylor
videos.description: Miles Davis gets behind his defender and finds his way into the end zone with a 26-yard touchdown vs. Baylor.

videos.headline: Jake Retzlaff keeps it himself for a BYU rushing score
videos.description: Jake Retzlaff fakes the hand-off and sprints into the end zone for a 17-yard rushing touchdown against Baylor.

videos.headline: Baylor's Sawyer Robertson scampers into end zone on 20-yard TD run
